title: Even when things don't workout — villain arc, set heart ablaze
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-paragraph mid-2023 mantra: "Even when things don't workout, they do workout. As long as you don't give up."
  • Frames giving up as becoming the villain: "Become a villain becoming soulless and not allowing for warm opening to happen. The villain arc songs."
  • Counter-move: "feel thunder in your heart. Set your heart ablaze type beat."
  • Specimen of the soul as beacon / magnetic aura cluster (already exist as concepts).
  • Anime-coded language ("villain arc songs", "set your heart ablaze type beat") matches 2020 08 24 anime list taste profile.

Key quotes

"Even when things don't workout, they do workout. As long as you don't give up"

"giving up, giving in to the void is that. Become a villain becoming soulless"

"feel thunder in your heart. Set your heart ablaze type beat"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Cleanest single articulation of the don't-go-soulless mantra. Pairs with 2024 09 12 never forget and the void-confrontation theme in 2026 02 26 motherfucker falls backwards.
  • The "warm opening" image is reused later — see 2024 09 12 never forget's "spread seedling everywhere you go".
  • "satan comment" reference — context unclear; could be a podcast/conversation cue not in the corpus.

Open questions

  • What "random satan comment" was he referencing? Specific person/context?

Wikilinks

soul as beacon · magnetic aura · fear of not doing · founder loneliness 2022 2026
